name: 600 W Programmable DC Electronic Load (150 V / 120 A)
tagline: 600 W programmable DC load — 150 V / 120 A, CC/CV/CR/CP modes, 4.3-inch LCD, List mode, battery discharge test and RS232C interface.
description: The Vartech EL-600+ is a 600 W programmable DC electronic load with a maximum input of 150 V and 120 A. It operates in Constant Current (CC), Constant Voltage (CV), Constant Resistance (CR) and Constant Power (CP) modes across 9 basic operation modes (CCL, CCH, CVL, CVH, CRL, CRM, CRH, CPV, CPC). A 4.3-inch backlit LCD display with high-speed rotary dial and keypad allows easy programming. The EL-600+ includes List mode (step time 10 ms to 99999 s), Short Circuit test, Battery Discharge Capacity test (up to 3000 Ah, 1 s to 100 h), and full protection — OCP, OVP, OPP, OTP and reverse voltage. RS232C interface for PC control. The EL-600+ has a higher 120 A current rating than the standard EL-600.
features: 600 W, 150 V max, 120 A max — higher current rating than the EL-600
CC, CV, CR, CP — 4 basic operating modes across 9 mode variants
CC accuracy: ≤±(0.1% + 0.1% FS);  CV accuracy: ≤±(0.05% + 0.02% FS)
List mode — programmable step sequences with 10 ms to 99999 s step time
Battery Discharge Capacity test — up to 3000 Ah, discharge time 1 s to 100 h
OCP, OVP, OPP, OTP and Reverse Voltage protections
4.3-inch backlit LCD with rotary dial and keypad;  RS232C PC interface

specs.label: Operating Modes
specs.value: CC, CV, CR, CP  (4 basic modes;  9 variants: CCL, CCH, CVL, CVH, CRL, CRM, CRH, CPV, CPC)

specs.label: Ripple & Noise
specs.value: CC: 3 mA / 30 mA rms / p-p;  CV: 5 mV rms

specs.label: Battery Discharge Test
specs.value: Capacity: up to 3000 Ah;  Discharge time: 1 S ~ 100 H

specs.label: Protection
specs.value: OCP, OVP, OPP, OTP, Reverse Voltage

specs.label: Display
specs.value: 4.3-inch backlit LCD;  rotary dial + keypad input

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: User's manual, mains cord;  RS232 cable optional

name: 600 W Programmable DC Electronic Load (150 V / 60 A)
tagline: 600 W programmable DC load — 150 V / 60 A, CC/CV/CR/CP modes, List mode, battery discharge test and RS232C interface.
description: The Vartech EL-600 is a 600 W programmable DC electronic load with a maximum input of 150 V and 60 A. It shares the same platform as the EL-600+ — CC, CV, CR and CP operating modes across 9 mode variants, List mode (step time 10 ms to 99999 s), Short Circuit test, Battery Discharge Capacity test (up to 3000 Ah), OCP/OVP/OPP/OTP and reverse voltage protection, and RS232C interface. The 4.3-inch backlit LCD with rotary dial provides easy programming. The EL-600 is the standard current variant; the EL-600+ offers a higher 120 A maximum current.
features: CC, CV, CR, CP — 4 basic operating modes across 9 mode variants
CC accuracy: ≤±(0.1% + 0.1% FS);  CV accuracy: ≤±(0.05% + 0.02% FS)
List mode — programmable step sequences with 10 ms to 99999 s step time
Battery Discharge Capacity test — up to 3000 Ah
OCP, OVP, OPP, OTP and Reverse Voltage protections
4.3-inch backlit LCD with rotary dial and keypad;  RS232C PC interface
